parsed.production_notes: The video is entirely AI-generated, evidenced by the uncanny, stiff facial animations and unnatural lip-syncing. The background is perfectly static with no environmental movement, and the characters exhibit a typical AI-generated plastic sheen.

characters.appearance: Older male with a dark complexion, deep facial wrinkles, and a grey mustache. He has a lean build.
characters.wardrobe: Dark turban, a dark patterned button-down shirt, and a grey and white striped dhoti. He holds a sickle.

characters.appearance: Younger male with a fair complexion, clean-shaven face, and neatly combed dark hair. He has a medium build.
characters.wardrobe: White short-sleeved dress shirt, dark trousers, black belt, and a stethoscope around his neck. He holds a notepad and pen.

scenes.setting: Golden wheat field, daytime, bright sunlight.

panels.panel_visual_description: A medium shot of two men standing in a golden wheat field under a clear sky. Character A, on the left, holds a curved sickle in his right hand and gestures with his left hand while speaking. Character B, on the right, holds a small notepad and pen, looking attentively at Character A. The background features a vast field of tall, golden wheat and distant hills. The lighting is bright and natural, suggesting midday sun.

scenes.visual_description: The scene shows a farmer and a doctor conversing in a wheat field. The farmer speaks in English, and the doctor looks surprised and responds. A green banner with text is visible at the top of the screen, and subtitles appear at the bottom.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: I am feeling pain in my chest when I breathe. Because of this, I am not able to sleep properly.
Character B says: તમારી ઇંગ્લિશ તો બહુ સરસ છે. કોઈ કોર્સ કર્યો છે કે શું? [Your English is very good. Have you done any course or what?]
Character A says: કોર્સ કરવા માટે પૈસા પણ જોઈએ અને ભણતર પણ જોઈએ. હું તો ફક્ત પાંચમું પાસ છું. [To do a course, one needs money and education. I have only passed the fifth standard.]
Character B says: પછી કેવી રીતે? તો પછી આટલી સરસ ઇંગ્લિશ કેવી રીતે બોલી લો છો? [Then how? Then how are you able to speak such good English?]

scenes.visual_description: The farmer explains how he learned English using an app. An overlay of the app's interface appears over the center of the screen, showing an AI teacher avatar and learning modules. Later, graphic overlays of '30 Days' and a clock appear. The green banner remains at the top.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: MySivi સર. આમાં જે AI Teacher છે, એણે મારા જેવા અભણ માણસને પણ ઇંગ્લિશ બોલતા શીખવાડી દીધું. એ પણ ફક્ત 30 days માં. [MySivi sir. The AI Teacher in this taught even an uneducated man like me to speak English. That too in just 30 days.]
Character B says: રોજ બસ 10-15 minute practice કરો. બસ કોઈ ads ની માથાકૂટ નથી બહુ આસાનીથી શીખી શકો છો. [Just practice for 10-15 minutes daily. There is no hassle of ads, you can learn very easily.]
scenes.on_screen_text:

MySivi સર.
